nws_periods.name: Tonight
nws_periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Partly Cloudy
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 10pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly cloudy, with a low around 62. East wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_periods.name: Saturday
nws_periods.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 84. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_periods.name: Saturday Night
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 4am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 65. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
